title: 7 Chakra Rice Chain Necklace – 24K Gold Tone Plated
short_description: Seven chakra-inspired beads on a sleek 24K gold tone plated rice chain — spiritual meaning with a clean, premium everyday look.
body_html:
Alignment | Inner Balance | Everyday Energy

Carry balance with a clean golden shine. This 7 Chakra Rice Chain Necklace brings seven chakra-inspired beads together on a sleek 24K gold tone plated rice chain — a meaningful piece that feels spiritual, stylish, and effortless to wear every day.

The colourful chakra beads represent energy alignment, inner calm, positivity, confidence, clarity, and grounding. Paired with the rice-style golden chain, the design stays premium without ever feeling heavy or loud.

Key Highlights

  • 7 Chakra Bead Design — seven colourful chakra-inspired beads symbolising balance from Root to Crown energy.
  • 24K Gold Tone Plated Rice Chain — sleek rice-style links with a polished golden finish for a clean, premium look.
  • Stainless Steel Base — a sturdy chain base built for regular wear.
  • Lightweight & Comfortable — easy to wear daily with casual outfits, office looks, festive wear, or meditation styling.
  • Premium Minimal Look — the beads add meaning while the golden chain keeps the design elegant and wearable.

Why You'll Love It

  • Represents all 7 chakras in one jewellery piece
  • Supports a balanced, positive mindset
  • Helps you carry calm, focused, grounded energy through the day
  • Adds a stylish spiritual touch to everyday outfits
  • A thoughtful gift for meditation lovers and crystal jewellery fans

How To Style

Wear it as your daily spiritual piece — it pairs beautifully with plain T-shirts, shirts, kurtas, festive outfits, and meditation wear. To keep the shine longer, keep it away from water and perfume, and wipe gently after use.
seo_title: 7 Chakra Necklace – 24K Gold Tone Rice Chain
seo_description: 7 chakra bead necklace on a 24K gold tone plated rice chain. Spiritual, minimal, everyday jewellery by Studd Muffyn. COD available, ships in 24 hrs.

metafields.highlights: 7 chakra-inspired beads · 24K gold tone plated rice chain · Stainless steel base · Lightweight everyday wear · Spiritual + minimal styling
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Chain: rice-style links, 24K gold tone plated over a stainless steel base. Beads: 7 chakra-inspired multi-colour round smooth-polished beads.
metafields.care_or_directions: Avoid water, perfume, sweat, and harsh chemicals. Wipe gently after use and store in a dry pouch or jewellery box.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: What is special about this necklace?
faqs.a: It combines seven chakra-inspired beads with a 24K gold tone plated rice chain, giving you spiritual meaning and premium everyday styling in one piece.

faqs.q: What do the 7 chakra beads represent?
faqs.a: The seven beads symbolise balance from Root to Crown energy — grounding, confidence, positivity, communication, clarity, and inner calm.
Yes. It is lightweight and comfortable, and styles easily with casual outfits, office looks, kurtas, festive wear, and meditation wear.
The chain has a 24K gold tone plated finish over a stainless steel base, with a sleek rice-chain texture.
Absolutely — it is a thoughtful gift for meditation lovers, crystal jewellery fans, and anyone drawn to spiritual styling.
Keep it away from water, perfume, sweat, and chemicals. Wipe gently after use and store it separately in a dry pouch or jewellery box.
